# Project blueprint

<!-- mol:map:managed begin -->
<!-- This block is regenerated by /mol:map. Custom annotations go
     OUTSIDE these markers and are preserved across re-runs. -->

_Generated 2026-05-27 by /mol:map (whole-repo scope, harness-phase-10 refresh)._

## Inventory (layered)

molexp now ships **five Python layers under `src/molexp/`** plus the application shell and the React UI. The core dependency DAG is `workspace ← workflow ← agent`, with the new `harness/` provenance-first runtime sitting as a **sibling** of those three (one-way edge: `harness → workspace` only). The FastAPI server, the Typer CLI, and registered plugins (`gh`, `submit_molq`, `tensorboard`) sit on top; the React 19 UI is downstream of the server's OpenAPI surface. A small set of cross-layer primitives at the package root (`path`, `_typing`, `_logger`, `_run_cancel`, `entry`, `monitor`, `tree_monitor`, `config/`, `git/`) is citable from any layer.

### Module list

**Layer 0 — `src/molexp/` (cross-layer primitives, package root)**
- `molexp` (`__init__.py`) — re-exports `Experiment` / `GridSpace` / `Logger` / `ParamSpace` / `Path` / `Project` / `Run` / `RunContext` / `UniformSpace` / `Workspace` / `entry` / `get_logger`; lazy `__getattr__` for the `workspace` / `workflow` / `plugins` subpackages.
- `molexp._typing` — `JSONValue` and shared narrow typing aliases.
- `molexp._logger` — `Logger` (subclass of `mollog.Logger`) + `get_logger`; package-local logger factory.
- `molexp._run_cancel` — Cancel-helpers for the explore-tree monitor (molq job lookup / local PID / "cannot cancel" fallback).
- `molexp.entry` — `entry()` registry + `load_workspaces()` / `find_workflow_for_run()` / `clear_registry()` / `load_workflow_from_entrypoint()`; the script-level workflow-discovery surface.
- `molexp.monitor` — `RunMonitor`: lifecycle controller for the full-screen run dashboard.
- `molexp.path` — `Path` (subclass of `pathlib.PurePosixPath`); cross-host POSIX path primitive, no I/O.
- `molexp.tree_monitor` — Interactive collapsible workspace tree for `molexp workspace ... explore`.
- `molexp.config` — process-global, in-code config: a live `molcfg.Config` instance defined in `molexp/__init__.py`. Register runtime values (LLM keys etc.) with molcfg-native syntax (`molexp.config["deepseek_api_key"] = ...`); never read from env. The agent router reads provider keys from here.
- `molexp.profile` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `loader.py`, `models.py`) — file-based, per-run profile config: `MolCfg` / `ProfileConfig` / `load_molcfg` / `find_default_config` / `normalize_profile_name` / `DEFAULT_CONFIG_FILENAMES`.
- `molexp.git` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `_subprocess.py`, `operations.py`, `worktree.py`) — `ensure_clone` / `fetch` / `push` / `GitWorktreeManager`; thin async wrappers around the `git` binary.
- `molexp.openapi.json` — vendored OpenAPI schema snapshot used by `npm run generate:api` (not a Python module).

**Layer 1 — `src/molexp/workspace/` (bottom — pure storage)**
- `molexp.workspace` (`__init__.py`) — package root re-exporting the public storage surface.
- `molexp.workspace.assets` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `_adapter.py`, `accessors.py`, `artifact.py`, `base.py`, `checkpoint.py`, `data.py`, `error.py`, `execution.py`, `lineage.py`, `log.py`, `manifest.py`, `output.py`, `view.py`) — typed Asset hierarchy + per-scope manifest + `DataAssetLibrary`.
- `molexp.workspace.cache` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `folder.py`) — `CacheFolder` singleton (`ws.cache`); exposes `as_cache_store()` adapter for the workflow layer's `CacheStore` Protocol.
- `molexp.workspace.catalog` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `folder.py`, `index.py`) — `CatalogFolder` singleton (`ws.catalog`) hosting `AssetCatalog`.
- `molexp.workspace.base` — atomic-JSON / atomic-text I/O (`atomic_write_json` / `atomic_write_text`) + container-index helpers.
- `molexp.workspace.checkpoint` — `CheckpointState` model + file IO.
- `molexp.workspace.context` — `Context` data model.
- `molexp.workspace.errors` — workspace exception hierarchy (`ProjectExistsError` / `ProjectNotFoundError` / `ExperimentExistsError` / `ExperimentNotFoundError` / `RunExistsError` / `RunNotFoundError` / `FolderMoveCollisionError`).
- `molexp.workspace.experiment` — `Experiment(Folder)` entity.
- `molexp.workspace.folder` — `Folder` base class (parent pointer, lazy mkdir, atomic JSON I/O, kind-checked metadata, five-verb CRUD `add_folder/get_folder/has_folder/list_folders/remove_folder`, auto-derived index filenames) + `WORKSPACE_ROOT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_PROJECT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_EXPERIMENT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_RUN_KIND` constants.
- `molexp.workspace.fs` — `FileSystem` `@runtime_checkable` Protocol + `PathArg` alias + `StatResult` frozen dataclass.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_local` — `LocalFileSystem` (pathlib + os + shutil).
- `molexp.workspace.fs_remote` — `RemoteFileSystem` wrapping `molq.transport.Transport`.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_cached` — **NEW.** `CachingFileSystem` decorator + `prefetch_workspace_indices`; server-side lazy-download mirror around an inner `FileSystem` (meaningful for `RemoteFileSystem`). Invalidates on mutation, prefetches the standard `workspace.json → projects → experiments → runs` chain.
- `molexp.workspace.metrics` — run-local JSONL metrics.
- `molexp.workspace.models` — `FolderMetadata` (base) + `WorkspaceMetadata` / `ProjectMetadata` / `ExperimentMetadata` / `RunMetadata` / `ExecutionRecord` / `ComputeTarget` / `ErrorInfo`.
- `molexp.workspace.param` — `ParamSpace` / `GridSpace` / `UniformSpace` / `Params`.
- `molexp.workspace.project` — `Project(Folder)` entity.
- `molexp.workspace.resume_policy` — `WalltimeChunk` + resume policies.
- `molexp.workspace.run` — `Run(Folder)` + `RunContext` (sync + async context manager) + `RunStatus`.
- `molexp.workspace.schema_version` — JSON-schema version constant + load/upgrade helpers.
- `molexp.workspace.target` — `Target` value-type sum (`LocalTarget` / `RemoteTarget`), `parse_target` / `resolve_target` / `target_to_transport` / `target_to_filesystem`, `Session` / `SessionManager`, `TargetNotFound` / `TargetNeedsResolution`.
- `molexp.workspace.targets` — compute-target registry helpers backed by `WorkspaceMetadata.targets`.
- `molexp.workspace.utils` — `slugify`, `compute_content_hash`, helpers.
- `molexp.workspace.workspace` — `Workspace(Folder)` + `set_cli_root_override`; `__init__` load-or-create reads metadata only, writes its root lazily via `materialize()`.

**Layer 2 — `src/molexp/workflow/` (middle — graph engine)**
- `molexp.workflow` (`__init__.py`) — re-exports the public OOP API.
- `molexp.workflow._graph_decl` — internal task-registration declarations.
- `molexp.workflow._helpers` — `_callable_name` / `_stable_workflow_id` / `_to_snake_case` private helpers.
- `molexp.workflow._names` — `generate_name`.
- `molexp.workflow.binding` — `WorkflowBinding` / `WorkflowBindingRegistry` / `default_binding_registry` (task-type binding registry).
- `molexp.workflow.cache` — `Caching` LRU + `CacheEntry` + `CACHE_FORMAT_VERSION`.
- `molexp.workflow.cache_store` — `CacheStore` Protocol + `FileCacheStore`.
- `molexp.workflow.context` — `TaskContext` + `ActorContext`.
- `molexp.workflow.contract` — `WorkflowContract` / `TaskIO` / `TaskInputSpec` / `TaskOutputSpec` / `ArtifactDecl` / `ValidationCheck` / `ValidationCheckId` / `ValidationIssue` / `ValidationReport` / `Severity` / `default_validation_checks` / `validate_workflow_contract`.
- `molexp.workflow.promote` — `promote_callable` / `resolve_callable_entrypoint` / `resolve_spec_entrypoint`.
- `molexp.workflow.protocols` — `Runnable` / `Streamable` Protocols + structural aliases.
- `molexp.workflow.registry` — `TaskTypeRegistry` + `default_registry`.
- `molexp.workflow.compiler` — `WorkflowCompiler` (mutable; decorator + OOP) → `.compile()` → `CompiledWorkflow`.
- `molexp.workflow.compiled` — `CompiledWorkflow` (frozen, content-hashed graph artifact) + `.subgraph()`.
- `molexp.workflow.codec` — `WorkflowCodec` / `default_codec` (workflow ⇄ wire-format serialization).
- `molexp.workflow.ir` — `WorkflowGraphIR` + `GraphTaskIR` / `GraphEdgeIR` / `GraphLoopIR` / `GraphParallelIR` / `GraphNodePosition` / `EdgeKind` + `build_workflow_graph_ir`.
- `molexp.workflow.mermaid` — `render_workflow_mermaid`.
- `molexp.workflow.sweep` — `SweepMap`.
- `molexp.workflow.snapshot` — `TaskSnapshot` (AST-normalized identity).
- `molexp.workflow.snapshot_ref` — `WorkflowSnapshotRef`.
- `molexp.workflow.task` — `Task` / `Actor` plain `abc.ABC` base classes.
- `molexp.workflow.types` — `WorkflowResult`, `WorkflowExecution`, `End` re-export, edge sum types, error hierarchy (incl. `WorkflowDeadlockError`), IR-internal `Next`.
- `molexp.workflow.version` — `WorkflowVersion` / `TaskTopologyEntry` / `WorkflowVersionConflictError`.
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` (private subpackage; sole `import pydantic_graph` site): `compiler.py` (`WorkflowGraphCompiler` — lowers one `Step` per task, no `WorkflowStep`), `node.py` (`run_task_body` + context build), `persistence.py` (`RunStorePersistence`), `runtime.py` (`WorkflowRuntime`, `make_execution_id`), `state.py` (`WorkflowState`, `WorkflowDeps`).
- `molexp.workflow.schema` — JSON-Schema Draft-07 wire-format docs (`workflow.json`, `task_config.json`, `link.json`, `task_io.json`, `workflow_contract.json` + `README.md`).

**Layer 3 — `src/molexp/agent/` (pydantic-ai facade + LLM-only modes; sibling of workflow, below harness)**

Post spec `harness-as-mode-substrate-03b` the agent layer is a **thin pydantic-ai facade** plus two LLM-only modes. Pipeline orchestration (Plan / Author / Run / Review) moved up into `molexp.harness`; agent now owns only Session / Router / Event / ExecutionEnv / HookRegistry primitives + ChatMode + InteractiveMode.

- `molexp.agent` (`__init__.py`) — public surface: `AgentRunner`, `AgentMode`, `AgentRunResult`, `AgentRuntime`, `AgentSession`, `ReviewDecision`, `ReviewPolicy`, `cli_ask`.
- `molexp.agent.mode` — `AgentMode` ABC (abstract `async def run(*, runtime, sink, user_input) -> None`) + `AgentRunResult`.
- `molexp.agent.runner` — `AgentRunner` + `AgentRunnerConfigError`; lazy `PydanticAIRouter`, per-run `AgentRuntime`. Surfaces `run()` and `run_events()`.
- `molexp.agent.runtime` — `AgentRuntime` frozen dataclass: bundles `session` / `router` / `execution_env` / `hooks` for the mode's `run()` call.
- `molexp.agent.router` — `Router` Protocol + `ModelTier` enum + `RouterTextResult` + `TierModels` + `AgenticChunk` discriminated union (`TextDeltaChunk` / `ToolCallChunk` / `ToolResultChunk` / `FinalChunk`).
- `molexp.agent.events` — `AgentEvent` discriminated union (`ModeStarted/CompletedEvent`, `ApprovalRequested/DecidedEvent`, `ArtifactWrittenEvent`, `TokenDeltaEvent`, `ToolCallStarted/CompletedEvent`, `ErrorEvent`, …) + `AsyncIteratorEventSink` (queue-backed `EventSink` + `AsyncIterator[AgentEvent]`).
- `molexp.agent.session` / `session_storage` / `session_entry` — `Session` (append-only entry-tree + leaf pointer), `SessionStorage` Protocol + `JsonlSessionStorage` / `InMemorySessionStorage`, the `SessionEntry` union (`MessageEntry` / `StageEntry` / `ApprovalEntry` / `ArtifactEntry` / `CompactionEntry` / `ModelChangeEntry`).
- `molexp.agent.compaction` — `CompactionSettings` / `CompactionPlan` / `prepare_compaction` / `estimate_tokens`.
- `molexp.agent.execution_env` — `ExecutionEnv` Protocol + `LocalExecutionEnv` + `ExecResult` / `ExecutionError`.
- `molexp.agent.hooks` — `HookRegistry` / `HookPoint` / `HookContext`.
- `molexp.agent.review` — `ReviewPolicy` callable alias, `ReviewDecision`, `ReviewView` / `StepView`, `BypassPolicy` / `AutoPolicy` / `HumanPolicy`, `cli_ask`.
- `molexp.agent.folders` — `Agent(Folder)` (`kind = "agent.agent"`) + `AgentSession(Folder)` (`kind = "agent.session"`).
- `molexp.agent.folders_metadata` — `AgentMetadata` / `AgentSessionMetadata`.
- `molexp.agent.types` — `Message`, `Usage`, `CallUsage`, `UsageBreakdown`, `AgentFailure`, `FailureKind`, `SessionStatus`, `Goal` / `GoalMode`, `utc_now`.
- `molexp.agent.settings` — `AgentSettings` (workspace-scoped tunables; frozen pydantic).
- `molexp.agent.modes` (subpackage) — **two** modes only:
  - `chat.py` — `ChatMode` / `ChatModeConfig` (one LLM round-trip → terminal `ModeCompletedEvent`).
  - `interactive/{mode.py, tools.py}` — `InteractiveMode` / `InteractiveModeConfig` (emergent CLI-default mode; drives `Router.stream_agentic` and forwards each `AgenticChunk` to the sink); `tools.py` ships read-only `read_file` / `list_directory` / `search_code` callables for `Agent(tools=[…])`.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` (private — sole `import pydantic_ai` site; `__all__ = []`):
  - `router.py` — `PydanticAIRouter`.
  - `mcp.py` — `build_mcp_server` / `check_stdio_handshake`.
  - `messages_codec.py` — `dump_model_messages` / `load_model_messages`.
  - `errors.py` — `ProviderError`.
  - `events.py` — pydantic-ai-side event helpers.
  - `retry.py` — pydantic-ai retry config.
- `molexp.agent.mcp` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `defaults.py`, `oauth.py`, `store.py`) — MCP config layer only.
- `molexp.agent.persistence` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `router.py`, `tiered.py`) — `TieredResourceStore` / `ResourceSpec` / `Scope` / `tiered_router_factory`.

**Layer 4 — `src/molexp/harness/` (provenance-first workflow harness — NEW; sibling of agent/workflow/workspace)**

Per its docstring this is a **top-level package**, sibling of `workspace` / `workflow` / `agent`. Dependency direction: `harness → workspace` plus a single sanctioned edge `harness → molexp.agent.router` (the SDK-free Router Protocol — per spec `harness-as-mode-substrate-03a`, used by `RouterBackedAgentGateway`). **MUST NOT import** `molexp.workflow`, `molexp.plugins`, `molexp.server`, `molexp.cli`; `pydantic_ai` / `pydantic_graph` must not be transitively pulled in either. Phases 1–10 + 03a have landed (state substrate, validators, registry, executors, policy/approval, audit, replay, router-backed agent gateway).

- `molexp.harness` (`__init__.py`) — package root; re-exports the public surface enumerated below.
- `molexp.harness.errors` — `HarnessError` base + `AgentResponseNotRegisteredError`, `ArtifactNotFoundError`, `CapabilityAlreadyRegisteredError`, `CapabilityCallValidationError`, `CapabilityNotFoundError`, `EventSeqConflictError`, `StageExecutionError`, `StagePersistedFailureError`.
- `molexp.harness.core/` — stage execution core:
  - `run_context.py` — `HarnessRunContext` (frozen container handing services to stages).
  - `stage.py` — `Stage` ABC with `async run(ctx) -> ArtifactRef`.
  - `stage_runner.py` — `StageRunner` (wraps each stage with `stage_started` / `artifact_created` / `stage_completed` events, auto-wires `derived_from` provenance edges).
- `molexp.harness.gateways/` — agent gateway contract + impls (renamed from `agents/` in spec 03b):
  - `gateway.py` — `AgentGateway` Protocol.
  - `stub.py` — `StubAgentGateway` (in-memory; intentionally NOT re-exported from package root).
- `molexp.harness.audit/` — audit + replay helpers:
  - `generate.py` — `generate_audit_report`.
  - `replay.py` — `find_last_successful_stage` / `replay_metadata`.
- `molexp.harness.executors/` — executor backends:
  - `executor.py` — `Executor` Protocol (`runtime_checkable`).
  - `dry_run.py` — `DryRunExecutor` (no real subprocess; pipeline smoke tests).
  - `local.py` — `LocalExecutor` (real `subprocess.run` with timeout + stdout/stderr capture).
- `molexp.harness.policy/` — policy + approval orchestration (Phase 6):
  - `evaluate.py` — `evaluate_approval_policy` (pure walk of a `BoundWorkflow` + optional `WorkflowIR` against an `ApprovalPolicy`) + `make_final_report_approval_request`.
  - `event_log.py` — `record_approval_request` / `record_approval_decision` (append `approval_requested` / `approval_granted` / `approval_rejected` events).
- `molexp.harness.registry/` — capability-registry contract:
  - `capability_registry.py` — `CapabilityRegistry` Protocol.
  - `in_memory.py` — `InMemoryCapabilityRegistry`.
- `molexp.harness.schemas/` — frozen pydantic data models (all `frozen=True`; discriminator fields are `Literal[…]` aliases):
  - `agent_call.py` — `AgentCallSpec`, `AgentCallResult`.
  - `approval.py` — `ApprovalIntent`, `ApprovalRequest`, `ApprovalDecision`.
  - `artifact.py` — `ArtifactKind`, `ArtifactRef`.
  - `audit_report.py` — `AuditReport`.
  - `bound_workflow.py` — `BoundTask`, `BoundWorkflow`, `ExecutionEnvironment`, `ResourcePolicy`.
  - `capability.py` — `ToolCapability`.
  - `command.py` — `CommandSpec`, `CommandResult`.
  - `event.py` — `EventType`, `HarnessEvent`.
  - `experiment_report.py` — `ExperimentReport`.
  - `parameter.py` — `ParameterSource`, `ParameterValue`.
  - `policy.py` — `ApprovalPolicy`, `PathPolicy`, `ToolPolicy`.
  - `test_spec.py` — `TestKind`, `TestStatus`, `TestSpec`, `TestResult`.
  - `user_plan.py` — `UserPlan`.
  - `validation.py` — `ValidationReport`, `ValidationViolation`.
  - `workflow_ir.py` — `TaskIR`, `WorkflowIR`, `DependencyEdge`, `ExpectedOutput`.
- `molexp.harness.stages/` — concrete `Stage` subclasses for the §3 pipeline:
  - `save_user_plan.py` — `SaveUserPlan`.
  - `generate_experiment_report.py` — `GenerateExperimentReport`.
  - `extract_workflow_ir.py` — `ExtractWorkflowIR`.
  - `validate_workflow_ir.py` — `ValidateWorkflowIR`.
  - `bind_molcrafts_tasks.py` — `BindMolcraftsTasks`.
  - `validate_bound_workflow.py` — `ValidateBoundWorkflow`.
  - `generate_test_spec.py` — `GenerateTestSpec`.
  - `approval_gate.py` — `ApprovalGate`.
- `molexp.harness.store/` — persistence backends (Protocol + impl pairs, mirroring `workflow.cache_store`):
  - `artifact_store.py` — `ArtifactStore` Protocol.
  - `file_artifact_store.py` — `FileArtifactStore` (content + refs + per-kind index on the filesystem; atomic writes via `workspace.atomic_write_json` / `atomic_write_text`; hashing via `workspace.utils.compute_content_hash`).
  - `event_log.py` — `EventLog` Protocol.
  - `sqlite_event_log.py` — `SQLiteEventLog` (append-only audit timeline, `UNIQUE(run_id, seq)` enforced by SQLite).
  - `provenance_store.py` — `ProvenanceStore` Protocol.
  - `sqlite_provenance_store.py` — `SQLiteProvenanceStore` (`artifact_edges` table + BFS lineage traversals).
  - `_sqlite.py` — private SQLite helper shared between the two SQLite stores (not in public surface).
- `molexp.harness.validators/` — pure structural validators (sync, deterministic, no I/O; return `ValidationReport`, never raise):
  - `workflow_ir.py` — `validate_workflow_ir` (duplicate task ids, dangling edges, cycles, missing producers, unresolved inputs, agent-inferred params not flagged for review, defense-in-depth grep for shell commands / backend leaks).
  - `bound_workflow.py` — `validate_bound_workflow` (ir-task mapping consistency, input/output key agreement, allowed-path workspace containment, baseline deny-list floor, edge-topology equivalence).
  - `test_spec.py` — `validate_test_spec`.
  - `provenance.py` — `validate_provenance`.

**Layer 5 — `src/molexp/server/` (FastAPI app)**
- `molexp.server` (`__init__.py`) — re-exports `ServerManager`.
- `molexp.server.app` — `create_app()` factory, lifespan, bundled-UI discovery, dev CORS.
- `molexp.server.dependencies` — `Settings`, `get_workspace`, `get_settings`.
- `molexp.server.exceptions` — typed HTTP exception classes.
- `molexp.server.handlers` — workspace-error → HTTP envelope translation.
- `molexp.server.manager` — `ServerManager` lifecycle (start/stop/status/logs).
- `molexp.server.workspace_targets` — **NEW.** `WorkspaceTarget` registry persisted at `~/.molexp/workspace_targets.json` via `workspace.atomic_write_json`; descriptors for remote workspace roots (exist *before* a workspace is open, so they can't live on a workspace). Includes `target_to_filesystem_for_workspace_target`.
- `molexp.server.routes` (subpackage with `create_api_router()`) — `agent.py`, `agent_admin.py`, `agent_task_store.py`, `agent_tasks.py` (Slice-1 stubs returning HTTP 503), `asset.py`, `catalog.py`, `execution.py`, `experiment.py`, `molq.py`, `project.py`, `registry.py`, `review_store.py`, `reviews.py`, `run.py`, `targets.py`, `tensorboard.py` (**NEW** — TensorBoard scalar route behind the optional `[tensorboard]` extra; lazy import of the parser so registration works without the dep, surfaces 503 with install hint on actual request), `workspace.py`, `_scope.py`.
- `molexp.server.schemas` (subpackage) — `requests.py`, `responses.py`, `molq.py`, `targets.py`, `workspace_runs.py`, `workspace_targets.py` (**NEW** — wire schemas for the `WorkspaceTarget` registry).

**Layer 6 — `src/molexp/cli/` (Typer CLI)**
- `molexp.cli` (`__init__.py`) — Typer `app` + side-effect registration of `init`, `agent`, `workspace`, `session`, `config`, `runs prune`, `target`, plus third-party plugin discovery via the `molexp.cli_plugins` entry-point group.
- `molexp.cli.__main__` — entrypoint shim.
- `molexp.cli._common` — shared rich console + `rprint` + `_TERMINAL_STATUSES` + `deterministic_run_id` + `reap_zombie_run`.
- `molexp.cli.agent_cmd` — **NEW.** `molexp agent` interactive REPL. Multi-turn REPL on top of `InteractiveMode`; each turn drives `AgentRunner.run_events()` and hands the live `AgentEvent` stream to `AgentEventRenderer`. Handles REPL-meta slash commands locally (`/help`, `/exit`, `/quit`); passes agent-semantic ones (notably `/plan`) through to InteractiveMode. Heavy `molexp.agent` imports are deferred so `molexp --help` stays fast.
- `molexp.cli.agent_render` — **NEW.** `AgentEventRenderer`: Rich-based terminal renderer for the typed `AgentEvent` stream. Lives in the CLI layer on purpose — the agent library emits plain typed events and never imports `rich`. One render path per event kind; token deltas stream inline.
- `molexp.cli.config_cmd` — `molexp config` Typer app (read/write `~/.molexp/config.json`).
- `molexp.cli.init_cmd` — top-level `molexp init [PATH]`.
- `molexp.cli.prune` — `molexp runs prune`.
- `molexp.cli.session_cmd` — `molexp session` Typer app.
- `molexp.cli.target_cmd` — `molexp target` Typer app.
- `molexp.cli.workspace` (subpackage) — primary `molexp workspace [TARGET] <command>` entrypoint:
  - `__init__.py` — `workspace_app` + the resolution callback.
  - `explore.py` — `explore` (delegates to `molexp.tree_monitor`).
  - `interactive.py` — `run_interactive` REPL.
  - `lifecycle.py` — `init` / `info` / `materialize` subcommands.
  - `monitor.py` — `monitor` / `watch`.
  - `resources.py` — `project` / `experiment` / `run` / `asset` resource CRUD.
  - `run.py` — `run` subcommand (script-driven workflow execution).
  - `serve.py` — `serve` (FastAPI + bundled UI).
  - `sync.py` — `sync` / `exec` / `shell` for remote-target file ops.

**Layer 7 — `src/molexp/plugins/` (registered plugin packages)**
- `molexp.plugins` (`__init__.py`) — `Capability` enum, `PluginRegistry`, `CapabilityNotAvailable`, lazy GH loader, re-exports `CliPlugin` / `discover_cli_plugins` / `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`.
- `molexp.plugins.cli` — `CliPlugin` descriptor + `discover_cli_plugins()` + `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION = "1"` + `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.cli_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.ui` — `discover_ui_plugin_dirs()` + `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.ui_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.gh` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `client.py`, `models.py`, `queries.py`) — `GitHubClient`, `GitHubGraphQLError`, GraphQL/REST models (`Issue`, `PullRequest`, `Comment`, `CheckRun`, `CreatePullRequestInput`, `AddIssueCommentInput`, `UpdateProjectFieldInput`).
- `molexp.plugins.submit_molq` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `dashboard.py`, `metadata.py`, `spec.py`, `staging.py`, `submit.py`) — molq scheduler submission + Remote Operations dashboard data source.
- `molexp.plugins.tensorboard` (subpackage — **NEW**; optional, behind `pip install molexp[tensorboard]`): `__init__.py` re-exports `ScalarPoint` / `ScalarSeries` / `discover_logdirs` / `read_scalars` / `require_tensorboard`. `parser.py` implements the thin tfevents → typed-Python parser (`discover_logdirs` walks a run dir for `events.out.tfevents.*`; `read_scalars` parses scalar series from one logdir; `require_tensorboard` raises a friendly `ImportError` route handlers translate to a 503).

**Layer 8 — `ui/src/` (React 19 frontend — package-level summary)**
- `ui/src/App.tsx` + `index.tsx` + `env.d.ts` — entry shell.
- `ui/src/api/generated/` — auto-generated OpenAPI client (`core/`, `models/`, `services/`). Never hand-edit; regenerated via `npm run generate:api`.
- `ui/src/api/previews/` — preview-only API helpers.
- `ui/src/app/` — application root: `registry.ts` / `registry.test.ts` / `types.ts` (entity-type → renderer map), `components/` (CommandPalette + Create*Dialog), `layout/` (AppShell / ContextBar / ErrorBoundary / ExecutionConsole / TopBar), `oauth/` (OAuthCallbackPage), `panels/` (CenterPanel / LeftPanel / RightPanel / TreeView), `renderers/` (entity viewers + `agentEvents.ts` / `registerRenderers.ts` + `PlanCard.tsx` / `SnapshotViewer.tsx`), `runs/` (runs dashboard subtree), `settings/` (agent_session + agent_settings subdirs), `state/` (Zustand stores wrapping the generated client), `__tests__/` (unit tests).
- `ui/src/components/` — shared presentational primitives + `charts/` + `ui/` shadcn-style primitives + `ConfirmDialog.tsx` + `PromptDialog.tsx`.
- `ui/src/lib/` — `contribution-registry.ts` + `file-preview-plugins.ts` + `file-type-discovery.ts` + `format-time.ts` + `utils.ts` + `workflow-python.ts` + `workflow-utils.ts`.
- `ui/src/plugins/` — bundled plugin runtime + `contribution-runtime.ts` + `loader.ts` + `runtime.ts` + `types.ts`. Bundled plugins:
  - `plugins/core/` — `index.ts`.
  - `plugins/metrics/` — `index.ts` + `RunMetricsTab.tsx` + `smoothing.ts`.
  - `plugins/molq/` — `index.ts` + `api.ts` + `format.ts` + `MolqExecutionColumn.tsx` + `MolqExecutionDetail.tsx` + `MolqJobInspector.tsx` + `MolqLogPanel.tsx` + `MolqRunInspector.tsx` + `MolqRunViewer.tsx` + `types.ts` + `molq-plugin.test.ts`.
  - `plugins/molvis/` — `index.ts` + `MolvisTab.tsx` + `TrajectoryViewer.tsx`.
  - `plugins/tensorboard/` — **NEW.** `index.ts` + `TensorBoardTab.tsx` (the TensorBoard tab in the run dashboard, downstream of the new `/tensorboard/scalars` route; full migration off `react-plotly`).
- `ui/src/__fixtures__/` — static fixture data.
- `ui/src/styles/tailwind.css`.
- `ui/src/types/` — `jsx.d.ts` + `task_graph_ir.ts`.
- `ui/mocks/` — MSW: `browser.ts` / `node.ts` / `db/` / `handlers/` / `utils/`.
- Bundled into `src/molexp/dist/` by `npm run build` and shipped in the wheel.

### Public surface

**Layer 0 — cross-layer primitives**
- `molexp` (top-level): `Experiment`, `GridSpace`, `Logger`, `ParamSpace`, `Path`, `Project`, `Run`, `RunContext`, `UniformSpace`, `Workspace`, `entry`, `get_logger`; lazy `__getattr__` for `workspace` / `workflow` / `plugins`.
- `molexp.path`: `Path` (PurePosixPath subclass).
- `molexp._logger`: `Logger`, `get_logger`.
- `molexp.entry`: `entry`, `load_workspaces`, `find_workflow_for_run`, `clear_registry`, `load_workflow_from_entrypoint`.
- `molexp.monitor`: `RunMonitor`.
- `molexp.tree_monitor`: interactive tree-monitor entry consumed by `cli.workspace.explore`.
- `molexp.config`: the process-global `molcfg.Config` instance (in-code runtime values; LLM keys).
- `molexp.profile`: `MolCfg`, `ProfileConfig`, `load_molcfg`, `find_default_config`, `normalize_profile_name`, `DEFAULT_CONFIG_FILENAMES`.
- `molexp.git`: `ensure_clone`, `fetch`, `push`, `GitWorktreeManager`.

**Layer 1 — workspace**
- `molexp.workspace` re-exports: `Folder`, `FolderMetadata`, `Workspace`, `Project`, `Experiment`, `Run`, `RunContext`, `RunStatus`, `Context`, `Params`, `ParamSpace`, `GridSpace`, `UniformSpace`, `WorkspaceMetadata`, `ProjectMetadata`, `ExperimentMetadata`, `RunMetadata`, `ExecutionRecord`, `ComputeTarget`, `ErrorInfo`, `Asset`, `ArtifactAsset`, `DataAsset`, `DataAssetLibrary`, `CheckpointAsset`, `LogAsset`, `ErrorTraceAsset`, `Producer`, `AssetCatalog`, `AssetsView`, `AssetScope`, `AssetManifest`, `CacheFolder`, `LocalTarget`, `RemoteTarget`, `Target`, `TargetNotFound`, `Session`, `SessionManager`, the folder-kind constants, the typed error hierarchy, target helpers (`parse_target`, `resolve_target`, `target_to_transport`), compute-target helpers (`add_target` / `get_target` / `has_target` / `list_targets` / `remove_target` / `target_run_dir` / `to_transport`), atomic I/O (`atomic_write_json`, `atomic_write_text`).
- `molexp.workspace.fs`: `FileSystem` Protocol, `PathArg`, `StatResult`.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_local`: `LocalFileSystem`.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_remote`: `RemoteFileSystem`.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_cached`: `CachingFileSystem`, `prefetch_workspace_indices`.
- `molexp.workspace.assets`: `ASSET_ADAPTER`, `AnyAsset`, `parse_asset`, accessors, `ImportAction`, the `lineage` submodule.
- `molexp.workspace.catalog`: `AssetCatalog`, `CatalogFolder`, `RebuildReport`, catalog constants.
- `molexp.workspace.cache`: `CacheFolder`, `WORKSPACE_CACHE_KIND`.

**Layer 2 — workflow**
- `molexp.workflow` exports (per `__all__`): `WorkflowCompiler`, `CompiledWorkflow`, `WorkflowResult`, `WorkflowExecution`, `End`, `Task`, `Actor`, `TaskContext`, `ActorContext`, `Runnable`, `Streamable`, `TaskTypeRegistry`, `default_registry`, `WorkflowBinding`, `WorkflowBindingRegistry`, `default_binding_registry`, `WorkflowCodec`, `default_codec`, `WorkflowRuntime`, `Caching`, `CacheStore`, `FileCacheStore`, `TaskSnapshot`, `WorkflowSnapshotRef`, `make_execution_id`, `promote_callable`, `resolve_callable_entrypoint`, `resolve_spec_entrypoint`, `generate_name`, the IR types (`WorkflowGraphIR`, `GraphTaskIR`, `GraphEdgeIR`, `GraphLoopIR`, `GraphParallelIR`, `GraphNodePosition`, `EdgeKind`, `build_workflow_graph_ir`), `render_workflow_mermaid`, `SweepMap`, the contract types (`WorkflowContract`, `TaskIO`, `TaskInputSpec`, `TaskOutputSpec`, `ArtifactDecl`, `ValidationCheck`, `ValidationCheckId`, `ValidationIssue`, `ValidationReport`, `Severity`, `default_validation_checks`, `validate_workflow_contract`), edge sum types (`UnconditionalEdges`, `BranchEdges`, `OutEdges`), versioning (`WorkflowVersion`, `TaskTopologyEntry`, `WorkflowVersionConflictError`), the error hierarchy (incl. `WorkflowDeadlockError`).
- `Next` deliberately NOT in `__all__` (IR-internal).
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` (private): `WorkflowGraphCompiler`, `RunStorePersistence`, `WorkflowRuntime`, `WorkflowState`, `WorkflowDeps`.

**Layer 3 — agent**
- `molexp.agent`: minimal — `AgentRunner`, `AgentMode`, `AgentRunResult`, `AgentSession` (re-export of `harness.session.Session`), and the three review primitives `ReviewDecision`, `ReviewPolicy`, `cli_ask`. No factories.
- `molexp.agent.harness`: `AgentHarness`; the `AgentEvent` discriminated union and its members; `Session` + `SessionStorage` / `InMemorySessionStorage` / `JsonlSessionStorage`; the `SessionEntry` union; compaction types; `ExecutionEnv` / `LocalExecutionEnv` / `ExecResult` / `ExecutionError`; `HookRegistry` / `HookContext` / `HookPoint`; **new** `Stage` / `NameOnlyStage`, `execute_pipeline`, `RepairPolicy`.
- `molexp.agent.mode`: `AgentMode`, `AgentRunResult`, `ModePipeline`.
- `molexp.agent.modes`: `ChatMode` / `ChatModeConfig`, `PlanMode` / `PlanModeConfig`, `AuthorMode` / `AuthorModeConfig`, `RunMode` / `RunModeConfig`, `ReviewMode` / `ReviewModeConfig`, **`InteractiveMode` / `InteractiveModeConfig`** (new); handoffs `ApprovedPlanHandoff` / `MaterializedWorkspaceHandoff`; folders `PlanFolder` / `RunFolder`; `RunProgress` / `StepProgress` / `RunReport` / `RepairEscalation`.
- `molexp.agent.modes._planning`: `IntentSpec` / `IntentConstraint` / `SuccessCriterion` / `ResourceBudget` / `RiskLevel` / `MissingInfoItem`; `PlanGraph` / `PlanStep` / `PlanStepIO` / `PlanStepInput` / `PlanStepArtifact` / `PlanCheck` / `RetryPolicy` / `IsolatedTestSketch`; `PlanState` / `LEGAL_TRANSITIONS` / `IllegalPlanTransitionError` / `assert_legal_transition` / `is_legal_transition` / `legal_successors`; `PlanDiff` / `PlanNodeOp` / `DiffOpKind` / `ApprovalGate`. (`CapabilityGraph` family removed.)
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan`: also `PlanGraphPreflightReport` / `preflight_plan_graph`, `AGENT_PLAN_KIND`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.review`: also `ReviewTarget` / `ReviewTargetKind` / `detect_review_target`, `ReviewVerdict` / `StepFinding` / `build_review_verdict`, the three checkers, `ReviewVerdictFolder` / `AGENT_REVIEW_KIND`.
- `molexp.agent.router`: `Router` Protocol, `ModelTier`, `TierModels`, `RouterTextResult`.
- `molexp.agent.folders`: `Agent`, `AgentSession` (Folder subclass, distinct from the `molexp.agent` re-export which is the runtime harness `Session`), kind + filename constants.
- `molexp.agent.types`: `Message`, `Usage`, `CallUsage`, `UsageBreakdown`, `AgentFailure`, `FailureKind`, `SessionStatus`, `Goal`, `GoalMode`, `utc_now`.
- `molexp.agent.mcp`: `McpStore`, `McpServerEntry`, `McpScope`, `McpSecretsStore`, `UnresolvedSecretError`, the OAuth surface (`FileTokenStorage`, `OAuthFlowSession`, `OAuthSessionRegistry`, `build_oauth_provider`, `default_redirect_uri`, `session_registry`, `storage_for`), defaults (`MCP_DEFAULTS`, `seed_user_defaults`, `MCP_CONFIG_FILENAME`, `MCP_SECRETS_FILENAME`, `MOLMCP_*`).
- `molexp.agent.persistence`: `TieredResourceStore`, `ResourceSpec`, `Scope`, `tiered_router_factory`.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` (private, `__all__ = []`): `PydanticAIRouter`, `build_mcp_server`, `dump_model_messages` / `load_model_messages`, `ProviderError`, and the new `build_research_planner` + `debug_repair` agent factories — reachable only via dotted internal paths.

**Layer 4 — harness (NEW)**
- `molexp.harness` re-exports (per its `__all__`): `AgentCallResult`, `AgentCallSpec`, `AgentGateway`, `AgentResponseNotRegisteredError`, `ApprovalDecision`, `ApprovalGate`, `ApprovalIntent`, `ApprovalPolicy`, `ApprovalRequest`, `ArtifactKind`, `ArtifactNotFoundError`, `ArtifactRef`, `ArtifactStore`, `AuditReport`, `BindMolcraftsTasks`, `BoundTask`, `BoundWorkflow`, `CapabilityAlreadyRegisteredError`, `CapabilityCallValidationError`, `CapabilityNotFoundError`, `CapabilityRegistry`, `CommandResult`, `CommandSpec`, `DependencyEdge`, `DryRunExecutor`, `EventLog`, `EventSeqConflictError`, `EventType`, `ExecutionEnvironment`, `Executor`, `ExpectedOutput`, `ExperimentReport`, `ExtractWorkflowIR`, `FileArtifactStore`, `GenerateExperimentReport`, `GenerateTestSpec`, `HarnessError`, `HarnessEvent`, `HarnessRunContext`, `InMemoryCapabilityRegistry`, `LocalExecutor`, `ParameterSource`, `ParameterValue`, `PathPolicy`, `ProvenanceStore`, `ResourcePolicy`, `SQLiteEventLog`, `SQLiteProvenanceStore`, `SaveUserPlan`, `Stage`, `StageExecutionError`, `StagePersistedFailureError`, `StageRunner`, `TaskIR`, `TestKind`, `TestResult`, `TestSpec`, `TestStatus`, `ToolCapability`, `ToolPolicy`, `UserPlan`, `ValidateBoundWorkflow`, `ValidateWorkflowIR`, `ValidationReport`, `ValidationViolation`, `WorkflowIR`, `evaluate_approval_policy`, `find_last_successful_stage`, `generate_audit_report`, `make_final_report_approval_request`, `record_approval_decision`, `record_approval_request`, `replay_metadata`, `validate_bound_workflow`, `validate_provenance`, `validate_test_spec`, `validate_workflow_ir`.
- Notable non-re-export: `StubAgentGateway` is intentionally hidden — production code can only see the `AgentGateway` Protocol; tests reach for the stub via its full dotted path.

**Layer 5 — server**
- `molexp.server`: `ServerManager`.
- `molexp.server.app`: `create_app`, `lifespan`.
- `molexp.server.dependencies`: `Settings`, `get_workspace`, `get_settings`.
- `molexp.server.workspace_targets`: `WorkspaceTarget` registry surface (load, save, lookup) + `target_to_filesystem_for_workspace_target`.
- `molexp.server.routes`: `create_api_router` + per-domain routers (`agent` / `agent_admin` / `agent_tasks` — 503 stubs, `asset`, `catalog`, `execution`, `experiment`, `molq`, `project`, `registry`, `reviews`, `run`, `targets`, **`tensorboard`** (new), `workspace`).
- `molexp.server.schemas`: wide pydantic surface for OpenAPI codegen — `*Request` / `*Response` models, the molq overview, workspace-runs aggregate, **`workspace_targets`** (new), plus the TensorBoard scalar response models (`TensorboardScalarPoint`, `TensorboardScalarSeries`) added to `responses`.

**Layer 6 — cli**
- `molexp.cli`: `app` (Typer instance). Top-level commands: `molexp init`, **`molexp agent`** (new — interactive REPL), `molexp workspace [TARGET] <command>`, `molexp session …`, `molexp config …`, `molexp runs prune`, `molexp target …`. Third-party plugins discovered via the `molexp.cli_plugins` entry-point group.
- `molexp.cli._common`: `console`, `rprint`, `_TERMINAL_STATUSES`, `deterministic_run_id`, `reap_zombie_run`.
- `molexp.cli.agent_cmd`: `agent` Typer command.
- `molexp.cli.agent_render`: `AgentEventRenderer`.
- `molexp.cli.workspace`: `workspace_app` Typer; subcommands attached as side effects from `explore`, `interactive`, `lifecycle`, `monitor`, `resources`, `run`, `serve`, `sync`.

**Layer 7 — plugins**
- `molexp.plugins`: `Capability` (`GH` only), `CapabilityNotAvailable`, `PluginRegistry`, `registry`, `CliPlugin`, `discover_cli_plugins`, `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`, `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION`.
- `molexp.plugins.cli`: `CliPlugin`, `discover_cli_plugins`, `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.cli_plugins"`, `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION = "1"`.
- `molexp.plugins.ui`: `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`, `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.ui_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.gh`: `GitHubClient`, `GitHubGraphQLError`, `Issue`, `PullRequest`, `Comment`, `CheckRun`, `CreatePullRequestInput`, `AddIssueCommentInput`, `UpdateProjectFieldInput`.
- `molexp.plugins.submit_molq`: scheduler submission helpers; submodules `submit`, `metadata`, `spec`, `dashboard`, `staging`.
- `molexp.plugins.tensorboard` (NEW, optional via `pip install molexp[tensorboard]`): `ScalarPoint`, `ScalarSeries`, `discover_logdirs`, `read_scalars`, `require_tensorboard`.

**Layer 8 — ui**
- TypeScript ESM exports — primary surface is the auto-generated OpenAPI client (`api/generated/`). Hand-written modules export per-file React components (`*Viewer.tsx` / `*Inspector.tsx` / `*Page.tsx` / `*Panel.tsx` / `*Tab.tsx`), Zustand store hooks, `registerRenderers()`, `resolvers/index.ts`, MSW handler arrays, the contribution-registry runtime, and the bundled-plugin entrypoints. Public registration points: `app/registry.ts` (entity-type → renderer), `app/renderers/registerRenderers.ts`, `plugins/runtime.ts` (UI-plugin loader), `mocks/handlers/` per-domain handler arrays.

### Style summary

**Layer 0 — cross-layer primitives**
- naming: snake_case modules; underscore prefix (`_logger`, `_run_cancel`, `_typing`) marks shared infra used by every layer but not part of the public surface.
- construction: pure data + thin helpers; no I/O at import (`monitor` / `tree_monitor` lazy-load `molq.dashboard`).
- error handling: `RunMonitor` / `tree_monitor` recover from missing molq job ids with structured warning return rather than raising.
- import discipline: `Path` is pure path arithmetic — never reaches the filesystem; the filesystem `Path` (stdlib) is reached only through `workspace.fs_local`.

**Layer 1 — workspace**
- naming: `PascalCase` types, `snake_case` functions; `*Metadata` pydantic models for on-disk shapes; `*Asset` for typed asset variants; `*ExistsError` / `*NotFoundError` for typed exceptions; `Folder` subclasses live alongside their entity module.
- construction: pure-data types are `pydantic.BaseModel(frozen=True)`; runtime entities are `Folder` subclasses with explicit `__init__`; child factories are idempotent and lazy — no disk *writes* in `__init__` (incl. `Workspace`, whose `__init__` only load-or-create *reads* metadata; the root mkdir/write happens lazily in `materialize()` via `_ensure_materialized()`).
- error handling: typed exceptions in `errors.py` carry the entity id; atomic JSON via temp-file + `os.replace` inside `LocalFileSystem.atomic_write_json`; folder-kind validation; idempotent `add_*` returns cached on collision.
- import discipline: **every I/O routes through `self._fs`** (a `FileSystem` Protocol) — never raw `pathlib.Path.read_text`. Stock impls: `LocalFileSystem` / `RemoteFileSystem` / **`CachingFileSystem`** (new mirror decorator).

**Layer 2 — workflow**
- naming: compiler/compiled separation (`WorkflowCompiler` → `CompiledWorkflow` after `.compile()`); `*_to_*` method names on `WorkflowCompiler`; error class names `<Verb>Error`; edge sum types `<Noun>Edges`.
- construction: value types are `BaseModel(frozen=True)`; `WorkflowExecution` is a plain class because it holds live asyncio state; `Task` / `Actor` are plain `abc.ABC` (NOT pg `BaseNode`); `_pydantic_graph/` is the sole subtree allowed to use `@dataclass`.
- error handling: `WorkflowError` hierarchy raised at compile time; `ParallelExecutionError` aggregates per-element failures; `LoopMaxItersExceeded` is a non-fatal `Warning`; cache `read` corruption is logged + entry deleted.
- import discipline: `pydantic_graph` imported only under `_pydantic_graph/`; `Next(label)` deliberately not in `__all__`.

**Layer 3 — agent**
- naming: `AgentMode` ABC + concrete `<Verb>Mode` + a paired `<Verb>ModeConfig`; shared runtime under `agent/harness/`; pure contracts under `agent/modes/_planning/`; pydantic-ai firewall under `agent/_pydanticai/`. Each declarative pipeline mode lives under `modes/<verb>/` and is a plain async sequence of harness `stage()` brackets; **`InteractiveMode` is the one emergent mode** — composes the declarative five via slash-command delegation.
- construction: `AgentRunner(mode=, model=/models=/router=)` with exactly-one-of validation; `PydanticAIRouter` and `AgentHarness` built lazily / per-run. Pure data is `pydantic.BaseModel(frozen=True)` — `arbitrary_types_allowed=True` is **forbidden** here; runtime containers (`AgentHarness`, `Session`, `LocalExecutionEnv`, the storage impls, `AgentRunner`, `Stage`) are plain classes with explicit `__init__`.
- mode contract: `AgentMode.run(*, harness, user_input)` is an async generator yielding `AgentEvent`s; terminal yield is a `ModeCompletedEvent` carrying `AgentRunResult`. Declarative modes drive their pipeline through `execute_pipeline()` walking a tuple of `Stage` instances with optional `RepairPolicy` rewinds.
- error handling: typed `AgentFailure` / `FailureKind`; `ExecutionError` is the subprocess-failure boundary; `_pydanticai.errors.ProviderError` is the single SDK-failure boundary; preflight / runtime failures surface as `PreflightFailedEvent` / `RepairProposedEvent` carrying a `PlanDiff`.
- import discipline: `import molexp.agent` loads **neither** SDK; `pydantic_graph` is **never** imported under `agent/`; only `agent/_pydanticai/*.py` may `import pydantic_ai`; `harness/` modules import neither SDK — compaction summarization + research planning + debug repair all flow through the `Router` Protocol or are constructed inside `_pydanticai/`.

**Layer 4 — harness (NEW)**
- naming: schemas under `schemas/` are `frozen=True` pydantic with `Literal[…]` discriminator aliases (not `enum.Enum`) — matches workspace convention. Protocol + concrete-impl pairs under `store/` (`ArtifactStore` / `FileArtifactStore`, `EventLog` / `SQLiteEventLog`, `ProvenanceStore` / `SQLiteProvenanceStore`); same shape for `Executor` / `LocalExecutor` / `DryRunExecutor` and `CapabilityRegistry` / `InMemoryCapabilityRegistry`. Validators in `validators/` are sync, deterministic, return `ValidationReport` and **never raise**; stage wrappers in `stages/` own the report-to-error lift. Concrete `Stage` subclasses are PascalCase verbs (`SaveUserPlan` / `ValidateWorkflowIR` / …).
- construction: `Stage.run(ctx)` returns one `ArtifactRef`; `StageRunner` brackets each stage with `stage_started` / `artifact_created` / `stage_completed` events and auto-wires `derived_from` provenance edges from the returned ref's `parent_ids`. Approval evaluation is a pure walk (`evaluate_approval_policy`) — interactive UX defers to Phase 7+. SQLite stores share a private `_sqlite.py` helper and enforce `UNIQUE(run_id, seq)` for the event log.
- error handling: `HarnessError` base; granular `ArtifactNotFoundError`, `CapabilityNotFoundError`, `CapabilityCallValidationError`, `CapabilityAlreadyRegisteredError`, `AgentResponseNotRegisteredError`, `StageExecutionError`, `StagePersistedFailureError`, `EventSeqConflictError`.
- import discipline: **strictly one-way `harness → workspace`** — atomic writes via `workspace.atomic_write_json` / `atomic_write_text`; hashing via `workspace.utils.compute_content_hash`. Explicitly does **not** import `molexp.workflow`, `molexp.agent`, `molexp.plugins`, `molexp.server`, `molexp.cli`. Note the deliberate naming clash with `agent.harness.Stage` — both packages own a `Stage` ABC but with different contracts (`harness.core.Stage` returns one `ArtifactRef`; `agent.harness.stage.Stage` is an async-generator yielding `AgentEvent`s). The package docstring calls this out explicitly.

**Layer 5 — server**
- naming: route modules named after the domain entity (`run.py`, `experiment.py`, `targets.py`, `tensorboard.py`, …); request schemas suffixed `*Request`, response schemas `*Response`; per-domain `APIRouter` aggregated by `create_api_router()`.
- construction: routes registered via `include_router`; FastAPI DI through `Depends(get_workspace)` / `Depends(get_settings)`; lifespan async context manager; CORS in dev; bundled-UI mount in production. `workspace_targets.py` persists via `workspace.atomic_write_json` — the cross-layer atomic-I/O primitive — explicitly avoiding upward agent/workflow imports.
- error handling: typed exceptions in `server/exceptions.py` mapped to JSON envelopes by `handlers.py:register_exception_handlers`; bundled-frontend lookup falls back gracefully when `dist/` empty; **the TensorBoard route lazily imports the parser** so registration works without the optional dep, returning a 503 with install hint only when an actual request lands.

**Layer 6 — cli**
- naming: command modules named `<verb>_cmd.py` at the top level (`init_cmd`, `agent_cmd`, `config_cmd`, `session_cmd`, `target_cmd`); the primary `molexp workspace …` entrypoint is itself a subpackage (`cli.workspace`) with one file per subcommand.
- construction: single Typer `app` built in `cli/__init__.py`; sub-typer apps attached via `add_typer`. **`agent_cmd` defers `molexp.agent` imports into the command body** so `molexp --help` stays fast. `agent_render` lives in the CLI on purpose: the agent library emits typed events and never imports `rich`.
- error handling: per-plugin `try / except Exception` with `logger.warning` so one broken plugin cannot prevent the CLI from booting; `_TERMINAL_STATUSES` constant for non-cancellable run states; the agent REPL handles REPL-meta slash commands locally and passes agent-semantic ones through.

**Layer 7 — plugins**
- naming: subpackage names `<category>_<implementation>` (`submit_molq`); one subpackage per `Capability`; `gh.client.GitHubClient` is async-only.
- construction: capability lazy loader pattern; `PluginRegistry` caches success / failure per `Capability`; `CliPlugin` is a frozen `__slots__` class with `register: Callable[[typer.Typer], None]`. **`tensorboard` ships a thin tfevents → typed-Python parser** behind `require_tensorboard()` so the HTTP layer can stay free of tensorboard-specific imports until a request needs them.
- error handling: every entry-point load wrapped in `_safe_load` / `_safe_resolve`; `api_version` mismatches and duplicate plugin ids are warned + skipped, never raised; `CapabilityNotAvailable` carries `_INSTALL_HINTS`.

**Layer 8 — ui**
- naming: PascalCase for components (`*Viewer.tsx`, `*Inspector.tsx`, `*Page.tsx`, `*Panel.tsx`, `*Tab.tsx`); camelCase for hooks (`use*`); kebab-case for routes; `state/` holds Zustand stores; bundled plugin packages live under `plugins/<id>/` with an `index.ts` registration entrypoint.
- construction: React 19 + Rsbuild; renderers registered via `registerRenderers.ts` keyed by entity-type strings in `app/registry.ts`; bundled plugins registered via `plugins/runtime.ts` + `contribution-runtime.ts`; OpenAPI client regenerated by `npm run generate:api` (never hand-edit `api/generated/`); MSW handlers under `mocks/handlers/` mirror server route domains 1:1. **Full migration off `react-plotly`** is complete; the new `plugins/tensorboard/` tab is the canonical example of consuming a new server route (`/tensorboard/scalars`).
- error handling: panels render fallbacks for missing data; UI-plugin loader logs and skips broken bundles; OAuth callback page surfaces backend errors verbatim.

### Layer roles

- `molexp.path` / `molexp._typing` / `molexp._logger` / `molexp.entry` / `molexp.monitor` / `molexp.tree_monitor` / `molexp._run_cancel` / `molexp.config` / `molexp.profile` / `molexp.git` — **Layer 0 (cross-layer primitives)**. Citable from any layer. They MUST NOT import any of `molexp.workspace`, `molexp.workflow`, `molexp.agent`, `molexp.harness`, `molexp.plugins`, `molexp.server`, `molexp.cli` at module load (`molexp.entry` and `molexp.monitor` lazy-import workspace types inside functions or under `TYPE_CHECKING`).
- `molexp.workspace` — **Layer 1 (workspace)**, bottom of the dependency DAG. Pure storage primitive. Owns the `Folder` base, the `FileSystem` Protocol + three implementations (local / remote / cached-mirror), assets, hierarchy, atomic JSON, singleton `CacheFolder` / `CatalogFolder`. **MUST NOT import** `molexp.workflow`, `molexp.agent`, `molexp.harness`, `molexp.plugins`, `molexp.server`, `molexp.cli`, `pydantic_ai`, or `pydantic_graph`.
- `molexp.workflow` — **Layer 2 (workflow)**. Graph engine. Uses `molexp.workspace` only (for `Run`, `RunContext`, `atomic_write_json`, the `CacheFolder.as_cache_store()` adapter). **MUST NOT import** `molexp.agent`, `molexp.harness`, or `pydantic_ai`. May import `pydantic_graph` only under `workflow/_pydantic_graph/`.
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` — **Layer 2 / private**. Sole `import pydantic_graph` site in the repo.
- `molexp.workflow.schema` — **Layer 2 / wire-format**. JSON-Schema documents consumed by the agent layer's IR emitters and the server's IR round-trip.
- `molexp.agent` — **Layer 3 (agent — pydantic-ai facade)**. Sibling of workflow above workspace. Post spec 03b the agent owns only LLM primitives + `ChatMode` + `InteractiveMode`; pipeline orchestration moved to harness. Uses workspace only. MUST NOT import `molexp.workflow` or `molexp.harness`. Uses `molexp.workspace` and `molexp.workflow` through their public surfaces. **MUST NOT import** `molexp.harness`, `molexp.plugins`, `molexp.server`, `molexp.cli`. May import `pydantic_ai` only under `agent/_pydanticai/`; **never** imports `pydantic_graph`; `import molexp.agent` must not eagerly load either SDK.
- `molexp.agent.harness` — **Layer 3 / shared runtime**. The `AgentHarness` every mode drives — `AgentEvent` stream, `Session` entry-tree + `SessionStorage`, compaction, `ExecutionEnv`, `HookRegistry`, and the new `Stage` / `execute_pipeline` / `RepairPolicy` substrate. Imports neither SDK.
- `molexp.agent.modes._planning` — **Layer 3 / pure contracts**. Frozen-pydantic planning types; zero LLM, zero I/O; substrate every mode reads.
- `molexp.agent.modes` — **Layer 3 / modes**. Post spec 03b only two ship: `ChatMode` (one round-trip) and the emergent `InteractiveMode` (drives `Router.stream_agentic`). Pipeline orchestration (Plan / Author / Run / Review) moved up into `molexp.harness`. Folder kinds `agent.agent` / `agent.session` still ship; the obsolete `agent.plan` / `agent.run` / `agent.review` kinds are gone.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` — **Layer 3 / private**. Sole `import pydantic_ai` site (`router.py`, `mcp.py`, `messages_codec.py`, `errors.py`, `events.py`, `retry.py`).
- `molexp.agent.mcp` / `molexp.agent.persistence` — **Layer 3 / agent subsystems**. MCP config layer and the generic three-tier resource store.
- `molexp.harness` — **Layer 4 (experiment orchestrator — top of the DAG)**. Sits **above** agent/workflow/workspace and composes all three. Allowed edges: `harness → agent + workflow + workspace`. Owns the 8-stage canonical pipeline (`SaveUserPlan → … → ApprovalGate`), `Stage` + `StageRunner` substrate, `ArtifactStore` / `EventLog` / `ProvenanceStore`, `CapabilityRegistry`, executors, validators, `ApprovalGate`, audit + replay. The `harness/gateways/` subpackage (renamed from `harness/agents/` in spec 03b) holds the `AgentGateway` Protocol + `StubAgentGateway` (test stub) + `RouterBackedAgentGateway` (production impl driven by `molexp.agent.router.Router`). **MUST NOT be imported by** workspace / workflow / agent / plugins / server / cli / sweep. Enforced by `tests/test_harness/test_import_guard.py`; the symmetric agent-side guard in `tests/test_agent/test_import_guard.py` forbids `molexp.harness` (and `molexp.workflow`) from being imported under `agent/`.
- `molexp.server` — **Layer 5 (application shell — FastAPI app)**. Sits on top of `agent + workflow + workspace`. Route-domain split + Pydantic schemas for the wire. **`server/workspace_targets.py` documents its layer position explicitly**: imports downward into `workspace.base.atomic_write_json` and `workspace.fs` only, never `agent` / `workflow` / `harness` upward.
- `molexp.cli` — **Layer 6 (application shell — Typer CLI)**. Sits on top of `agent + workflow + workspace`. Organized around `molexp workspace [TARGET] …` as the primary entrypoint, with `init` / `agent` / `session` / `config` / `runs prune` / `target` as top-level siblings. Discovers third-party CLI plugins via the `molexp.cli_plugins` entry-point group.
- `molexp.plugins` — **Layer 7 (registered plugin packages)**. Registry of optional capabilities (`GH` currently). Discovers third-party CLI / UI plugins via entry-point groups. **`molexp.plugins.tensorboard` is the first optional-extra plugin** (behind `pip install molexp[tensorboard]`).
- `ui/src` — **Layer 8 (frontend)**. React 19 SPA. Downstream of `molexp.server` via the auto-generated OpenAPI client (`ui/src/api/generated/`). Bundled into `src/molexp/dist/` by `npm run build` and shipped in the wheel.

### Deletions verified absent (vs. 2026-05-20 blueprint)

- **`agent.modes._planning.capability`** — `CapabilityGraph` / `CapabilityNode` / `CapabilityEdge` / `CapabilityEdgeKind` / `EvidenceState` are gone. Capability evidence now lives inline on each `PlanStep` as `api_refs` + `composition_notes`; the prior `_planning` cluster's capability module no longer exists (`_planning/` is now intent + plan_graph + lifecycle + diff only).
- **`agent._pydanticai.capability_probe`** and **`capability_probe_factory`** — gone. PlanMode no longer runs a separate capability-probe pass; its single `ResearchAndPlan` stage delegates to the new `_pydanticai/research_planner.py` MCP-attached `pydantic_ai.Agent` whose structured output is `PlanGraph` directly. The matching `agent.modes.plan` re-exports `CapabilityProbe` / `NullCapabilityProbe` / `ProbeResult` listed in the prior blueprint are also gone — the planner module no longer ships a Probe protocol.
- **`agent.modes.plan` codegen residue** — the prior blueprint's 7-stage pipeline (`SynthesizeIntent` → … → `EmitPlan`) collapses to **5 stages, 2 LLM ops**: `synthesize_intent` → `clarify_intent` → `research_and_plan` → `preflight_plan_graph` → `emit_approved_plan` (the new `plan/stages/` subpackage). A `thread_state.py` helper now carries inter-stage state.
- **`agent.modes` interactive entry** — the prior blueprint listed only five modes; `InteractiveMode` (CLI default, emergent, composes the declarative five) is the new sixth.
- The earlier `agent-pydanticai-rectification` deletions remain confirmed absent (`agent/_pydanticai/{harness,provider}.py`, `agent/{sessions,context,memory,recovery,skills,tools}/`, `agent/mcp/{source,tool_store,probe}.py`, `_legacy_types.py`, `observability/`, `orchestration/`, `sandbox.py`, `service.py`, `model*.py`, `planning/`, `coding_protocol.py`) — **unchanged since the 2026-05-20 prior blueprint**.
- **workspace / workflow / sweep** — `workspace.subsystem.SubsystemStore` remains absent; the build+compile authoring lives in `workflow.compiler` (`WorkflowCompiler` → `CompiledWorkflow`), with wire-format serialization in `workflow.codec` (`WorkflowCodec`) — there is no `workflow.builder` / `workflow.spec` / `workflow.serializer` module; the `cli/` reorganization around `cli/workspace/` holds; the standalone `src/molexp/sweep/` package remains removed (sweep lives at `workflow.sweep`). The one workspace addition is `workspace.fs_cached`.

<!-- mol:map:managed end -->
